---
title: "One Story by two authors, or,  A Tale without a Moral"
---

## One Story by two authors, or,  A Tale without a Moral

**Author:** Jean Ingelow
**Date:** 1862
**Imprint:** London: Masters

### Notes

Originally serialised in the <i>Monthly Packet</i> (February 1860 to June 1861)

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
